svg.title: Shibui full architecture — standards stack with AI agent layer
svg.desc: Five horizontal layers: governance and messaging standards at top, identity authorities, Shibui EAS attestation layer, token compliance interfaces, and AI agents with payment protocols at bottom.
svg.text: EXISTING STANDARDS — feed in, not replaced
IDENTITY AUTHORITIES — verify once, publish conclusion
SHIBUI — EAS attestation layer · open standard · EEA-maintained

g.text: EAS attestation — one credential, portable across any chain or FMI
isVerified(wallet) · addTrustedAttester(address, topics[]) · 15+ EVM networks · ~$0.07 on L2
schema: identity · kycStatus · accreditationType · countryCode · expiry · revocable in one tx

svg.text: TOKEN COMPLIANCE INTERFACES — accept any trusted credential
AI AGENTS — emerging actors, need verifiable identity to act on behalf

g.text: AI agent wallet — acts on behalf of institution or investor
ERC-8002 agent authorization · x402 micropayment protocol · vLEI role credential (who delegated this agent?)
agent credential = same EAS attestation schema · issuer = delegating institution · revocable instantly

svg.text: one investor or agent · one attestation · every token on every chain that trusts that institution
